title: Intro factual entities gate fixture
description: A vague opening that already contains concrete release facts later in the same intro and should be tightened into a more grounded opening.

copilot_issue.analyzer_note: The opening claim is readable but does not foreground enough concrete factual detail.
copilot_issue.snippet: WordPress 6.9 brought meaningful editor improvements for site owners and creators. The release shipped on March 29, 2026 and included 3 notable updates: better block controls, faster style revisions, and smoother editor performance.

repair_intent.instruction: Keep the intro publication-ready, but foreground the strongest concrete facts already present in the intro.
repair_intent.rule_hint: Bring the named entity, date, and concrete update count closer to the opening claim without inventing new facts.

manifest.plain_text:
WordPress 6.9 release highlights

WordPress 6.9 brought meaningful editor improvements for site owners and creators. The release shipped on March 29, 2026 and included 3 notable updates: better block controls, faster style revisions, and smoother editor performance.
